spec.doc: Parcel Post and Express Post - Label & Barcode Specification v1.4

rules.title: Returns service code 03 or 08 only
rules.description: eParcel Returns transactions support only service codes 03 (signature) or 08 (authority to leave).

messages.pass: Service code {actual} is permitted for eParcel Returns.
messages.fail: Service code {actual} is not permitted for eParcel Returns. Only 03 or 08 are supported.

rules.title: Returns are single-parcel consignments
rules.description: Return consignments always contain exactly one article, so the article count must be 01.

messages.pass: Article count is 01, consistent with a single-parcel return consignment.
messages.fail: Article count {actual} is invalid for a return. Returns are always single-parcel consignments.

rules.title: SSCC barcodes not permitted on returns
rules.description: The standard Parcel Post/Express Post barcode is mandatory for returns services; SSCC barcodes cannot be used.

messages.pass: No SSCC barcode is present on this return label.
messages.fail: An SSCC barcode was decoded on a returns label. SSCC numbering cannot be used for eParcel Returns.
